overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red coat exploring a rocky coastline at night. The character walks along elevated cliff paths and sandy beaches, approaching a distant campfire and encountering large crab-like creatures in the surf.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal cliff path with ocean overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow rocky path at the cliff's edge, overlooking the dark ocean waves below

entered.detail: narrow gravel and stone path along the cliff edge
dark choppy ocean water visible beyond the cliff edge
steep rocky cliff face rising on the left side of the path
dark night sky with visible stars

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow gravel path on a coastal cliff at night. The ocean is visible to the right with waves crashing against the rocks below, while a steep cliff wall rises on the left. The sky is clear and starry, with dim blue moonlight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach approach toward cliff base with distant campfire

events.description: scene shifts from elevated cliff path to lower sandy beach terrain
warm orange glow from distant campfire becomes visible against the cliff face ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across sandy terrain toward a large rock formation with a glowing campfire at its base, passing wooden fence posts

entered.detail: flat sandy and gravelly ground leading toward the cliff
massive rocky cliff face with layered stone formations
weathered wooden posts sticking out of the sand
warm orange light source at the base of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide sandy beach where the character walks toward a massive cliff face in the distance. A warm campfire glow is visible at the cliff base, contrasting with the cool blue night. Wooden fence posts line the right side of the path, and the ocean is now visible only in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tidal shoreline with surf and large crab creatures

events.description: large crab-like creatures become visible in the shallow water along the shoreline
character slows while approaching the large crab creatures resting in the surf

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge where waves wash onto the wet sand, approaching and observing large crab-like creatures in the shallow water

notable_agents.action: large crab-like creature partially submerged in the surf, facing toward the shore
second crab creature resting on the wet sand near the cliff base

entered.detail: shallow ocean water lapping against the sand with visible waves
dark wet sand where the tide reaches the shore
scattered wooden debris and rocks along the cliff base

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the shoreline where waves gently lap against the wet sand. Large crab-like creatures are visible in the shallow water and on the beach. The massive cliff wall now looms close on the left, while the open ocean stretches to the right. The character continues walking along the water's edge, passing the creatures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow cliffside path down to a wide, creature-filled shoreline under a starry night sky. It begins with the character navigating a gravel trail between a steep cliff wall and the crashing ocean waves, all bathed in dim blue moonlight. As the terrain descends, the scene opens into a broad sandy beach where the cool tones contrast with the warm glow of a distant campfire flickering at the base of a massive cliff. The camera then follows the character past wooden fence posts toward the water's edge, where the environment shifts to wet sand and gentle surf. Finally, the view expands to reveal large crab-like creatures wading in the shallows as the character walks along the shoreline beneath the looming presence of the cliff wall.
